retrieved_chunks.content: Threat Assessment Levels: - High risk: Braking/steering systems under attack → ASIL D safety requirements - Medium risk: Infotainment system exploited as springboard → ASIL B requirements - Low risk: Non-critical function data leakage → ASIL A requirements """
ASIL A: - Failure rate requirement: < 10^-6 /hour - Applicable systems: Entertainment system, air conditioning system - Development requirements: Structured development, basic testing

ASIL Level Assignment: - ASIL D (Highest): Braking system, steering system failure - ASIL C: Airbag, collision warning failure - ASIL B: Lighting system, windshield wiper failure - ASIL A (Lowest): Entertainment system, air conditioning failure
